children: By accepting you agree to our ToS

name: [fn] inner Checkbox Pressable has role="checkbox"
[fn] press fires onSelectedChange with true (false → true)
[fn] press fires onSelectedChange with false (true → false)
[fn] press on indeterminate fires onSelectedChange with true
[fn] onPress fires alongside onSelectedChange on each press
[fn] selected=true → inner Checkbox shows checked state
[fn] indeterminate=true → inner Checkbox shows mixed state
[fn] disabled=true → inner Checkbox is disabled
[fn] readOnly=true → press blocked on inner Checkbox
[fn] testID in single mode → getByTestId finds the element
[fn] testID in single mode → inner Checkbox Pressable accessible via testID directly
[fn] required=true + label → asterisk " *" visible in tree
[fn] required=false → no asterisk
[fn] error string renders as feedback text
[fn] error string makes isInvalid=true — inner Checkbox has errorHighlight
[fn] invalid=true makes isInvalid=true even without error string
[fn] empty error string ("") is NOT invalid
[fn] feedback ReactNode slot renders custom content
[fn] error auto-rendered feedback wrapper has accessibilityLiveRegion="polite"
[fn] dynamicText renders as visible text
[fn] helperButton renders with its text visible
[fn] helperButton fires onHelperPress when pressed
[fn] helperButton Pressable has disabled=true when field is disabled
[fn] dynamicTextSlot overrides dynamicText + helperButton
[fn] children render as stacked Checkboxes
[fn] field label renders as header text in multi mode
[fn] field description renders in multi mode
[fn] groupValue controls which child Checkboxes are checked
[fn] pressing a child in multi mode fires onGroupValueChange
[fn] field-level disabled is forwarded to all child Checkboxes
[fn] field-level size is forwarded to child Checkboxes
[fn] invalid=true forwards errorHighlight to child Checkboxes
[fn] uncontrolled multi mode: first press selects value
[fn] controlled multi mode: deselecting a checked value removes it from group
[fn] multi mode: selecting two children accumulates group values
[fn] multi mode: child own onSelectedChange fires on press
[fn] child with no value is ignored in group selection
[a11y] field wrapper accessible=true by default
[a11y] field wrapper accessibilityLabel from label prop
[a11y] field wrapper aria-label overrides label as accessibilityLabel
[a11y] field wrapper accessibilityState.disabled=true when disabled
[a11y] inner Checkbox has accessibilityRole="checkbox"
[a11y] aria-hidden on field → accessible=false, accessibilityElementsHidden=true
[a11y] multi mode: all child Checkboxes have accessibilityRole="checkbox"
[a11y] accessibilityHint is forwarded to field wrapper
[fn] BUG-CBF-1 FIXED: both error= and feedback= ReactNode are wrapped in accessibilityLiveRegion="polite"
[fn] BUG-CBF-2 FIXED: testID in single mode goes directly to the inner Checkbox Pressable
[bug] BUG-CBF-3: helperButton same color token for pressed/unpressed (visual-only bug)
